mechanism: OPEC+ fiscal breakeven reflexivity amplifies monetary policy pro-cyclically: during tightening, oil price decline triggers fiscal stress, compliance breakdown, additional supply, further price decline, reinforcing the tightening impulse through the commodity channel.
regime_dependence: Activates when oil prices approach or fall below Saudi fiscal breakeven ($85-96/bbl). Operates symmetrically in reverse during easing. Dampened when OPEC+ has large spare capacity buffer.
